Use a configuration like a 2x2 block missing one corner - e.g. living cells at [[0,0],[1,0],[0,1]] - then add a fourth cell so one of them has 3 neighbors. Or: cells at [[0,0],[1,0],[2,0],[1,1]] - the cell [1,0] has 3 neighbors (the other three cells). Test that cell [1,0] survives.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Green after completion.
